description_long: This is a large, heavy machine gun with a robust rectangular receiver and a long, perforated barrel shroud for cooling. The weapon is mounted on a sturdy tripod with three extended legs, providing stability for sustained fire. The receiver features a prominent charging handle and a rear sight assembly, while the barrel is cylindrical and extends well beyond the receiver. The overall finish is matte black, with metallic surfaces and some visible fasteners and mechanical details. There is no visible stock, and the ammunition feed system is not clearly shown, but the design suggests a belt-fed mechanism typical of heavy machine guns. The iron sights are mounted on top, with a rear aperture and a front post.
description: A large, matte black heavy machine gun with a perforated barrel shroud, mounted on a sturdy tripod. It features a rectangular receiver, prominent charging handle, and top-mounted iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the rectangular receiver, and the tripod legs splayed for stability.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view highlighting the circular barrel shroud, the alignment of the tripod legs, and the front sight post.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the receiver, charging handle, and the extended tripod legs.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver, the rear sight assembly, and the tripod's central mounting point.
attribute_barrel_type: long perforated heavy barrel with cooling holes
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: fixed rear aperture with front post
